title: 🧠 Cognition-Splitting Shrines
name: Cognition-Splitting Shrines
what_it_is: Sacred constructs that induce mind bifurcation—splitting consciousness into distinct layers, forcing inner dialogues to externalize.
how_to_use: she prays at the mindfork—her doubts take shape beside her
his shrine vision fractures—three selves argue the future
animation_behavior: Viewer splits into mirrored forms, inner voice gains visual presence, shrine echoes divergent thoughts
